extract: Dartrix (Japanese: フクスロー Fukuthrow) is a dual-type Grass/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. It evolves from Rowlet starting at level 17 and evolves into Decidueye starting at level 34. In Hisui, Dartrix evolves from Rowlet starting at level 17 and evolves into Hisuian Decidueye starting at level 36.
